largest = None
    # Remove factors of 2 first
    while n % 2 == 0:
        largest = 2
        n //= 2
    # Now n is odd. Check odd divisors starting from 3
    factor = 3
    while factor * factor <= n:
        if n % factor == 0:
            largest = factor
            while n % factor == 0:
                n //= factor
        factor += 2  # only test odd numbers
    # If n is greater than 1 here, it itself is prime and larger than any found
    if n > 1:
        largest = n
    return largest
